posts.author: shakedt (shaked talman)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re thrilled to invite you to webinar!
“All you want to know about HR process in monday.com”
date: 2.7.24 10 AM GMT -4

447764375_10232992359648820_7796711074043812391_n (1)1623×591 69.1 KB

During the webinar, we will cover:

  • Candidate recruitment processes in the Monday.com system

  • Discover how you can integratem cutting-edge AI tools into your recruitment processes with Monday.com, optimizing your workflow like never before!

  • Onboarding and offboarding processes for new and departing employees

As a bonus, we will reveal tool templates and advanced methods straight from the leading companies in the industry.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @shakedt can you please share the link with us! We would love to add it to our community calendar as well!
